top_signals.title: Ukrainian Drones Strike Russian Refinery Deep Behind Front Lines
top_signals.summary: Ukrainian drones targeted a Russian oil refinery hundreds of kilometers from the Ukrainian border, the latest in a campaign of deep strikes aimed at disrupting Russia’s oil industry. The May 31 overnight attacks on the facility in the central Saratov region -- the second since March -- did not appear to have caused any casualties. But a large fire and thick black smoke were reported at the plant belonging to the state-owned oil company Rosneft. Ukraine’s military said its drones targeted the Saratov refinery, along with several other…
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Pakistan Inflation Accelerates to 11.7% on Oil and Gas Import Shock
top_signals.summary: The surge in international oil and gas prices amid the Iran war hiked Pakistan's inflation to the highest level in two years as energy import costs ballooned. Pakistan's general inflation jumped to 11.7% in May from a year earlier, accelerating from 10.9% annual inflation in April, according to data from the Pakistan Bureau of Statistics published on Monday. The core inflation, which excludes food and energy, jumped by 9% year over year and by 8% month over month in May for urban areas, the statistics data showed. The biggest annual increases in…
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: FedEx Freight Shares Fall in First Trading Day After Spinoff
top_signals.summary: Shares of FedEx Corp.’s former freight division fell Monday on its first day of trading as an independent public company.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Central-bank repricing affecting yields, FX, liquidity and equities.

top_signals.title: Gold price falls nearly 2% as Middle East tensions escalate again
top_signals.summary: Spot gold set a weekly low of $4,450/oz. during the early trading hours.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Salesforce Investment in Anthropic Is Valued at About $5 Billion
top_signals.summary: Salesforce Inc. has a stake in Anthropic PBC worth about $5 billion after repeatedly investing in the ascendant AI startup.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Norway becomes ninth country to sign up for French nuclear deterrence as trust in US falters
top_signals.summary: Meanwhile, Germany will participate in French nuclear exercises as soon as September, joining them in an observer role.
